Interface ITerrainLasDataInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members that provide information about a LAS file.

[Guid("08AC58E1-F142-45DB-9847-0D28F6D7D241")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITerrainLasDataInfo2 : ITerrainLasDataInfo

Properties

IsStandardGpsTime

Indicates if the GPS time is standard GPS Time.

bool IsStandardGpsTime { get; }

bool
